body: "Details of the application  Raymond Brown Quarry Products Limited has applied to the Environment Agency for a licence.  The Environment Agency is giving notice of this application in accordance with Section 37 of the Water Resources Act 1991 and Regulation 6 of the Water Resources (Abstraction and Impounding) Regulations 2006.  The application is for a full licence to abstract water from the River Terrace deposits and Poole Formation at Hurst Farm and Station Road, Moreton, Dorset.  The application is to abstract water as follows:   834 cubic metres an hour 9,174 cubic metres a day 2,002,000 cubic metres a year Abstraction period – All year   The water will be used for mineral washing and storage for subsequent mineral washing. 95% of the water abstracted will be returned after use.  How to view the application  Please contact us via email or use the number below to arrange to see the application documents.  How to comment on the application  Send any representation about this application by email, quoting the name of the applicant and reference number NPS/WR/042747, to the Environment Agency at: PSC-WaterResources@environment-agency.gov.uk  By 13 September 2024.  For advice on how to make a representation call 03708 506 506. "
